headline: Why Analysts See More Upside for Lam Research (LRCX)
summary: With a forward P/E of 48.39, Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) is among the 10 Most Overvalued Quantum Computing Stocks According to Short Sellers. On June 9, UBS raised its price target on Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) to $375 from $310 while maintaining a Buy rating on the shares. The upward revision reflects the firm’s increasing confidence in the company’s growth outlook […]
